ops.title: Decide guides migration for the 8 bespoke-layout repos
ops.description: The 2026-07-16 fleet re-migration skipped 8 repos classified bespoke_layout (harvest, cc-skills@4db88c18): cc-vigil, crm, ego, repo-sync, room-scan, semisweet, stream-trade, yasyf.com. Most are single-fragment layouts (one guide file + cc-skills:ccx at most) that don't match the dev-guide+style template; room-scan and semisweet/stream-trade/yasyf.com also carry legacy `**Git.**` or repo-specific vcs prose (room-scan: XcodeBuildMCP sentence). Per-repo decision needed: adopt the modular refs with a custom layout order, or leave bespoke deliberately. Not urgent — these repos render fine today; they just hand-carry shared prose that will drift.

ops.text: each of the 8 repos has an explicit decision recorded (migrated or deliberately bespoke)
